items.task: Confirm Fabric workspace 'FASTA_DW' is provisioned and active
Confirm FastaLakehouse is created with bronze / silver / gold schemas
Run sql/ddl/01_bronze_tables.sql against bronze schema
Run sql/ddl/02_silver_tables.sql against silver schema
Run sql/ddl/03_gold_star_schema.sql against gold schema
Run sql/ddl/04_gold_views.sql to create reporting views
Run fabric/lakehouse/ddl/lakehouse_tables.sql (OneLake Delta DDL)
Confirm MLflow experiment 'fasta_lending_weekly_score' exists in Fabric
Confirm Unity Catalog namespace 'fasta.models' exists
Create linked service 'ls_fabric_lakehouse' in Data Factory
Upload nb_fabric_ml_01_credit_risk.py → convert to Fabric notebook
Upload nb_fabric_ml_02_affordability.py → convert to Fabric notebook
Upload nb_fabric_ml_03_churn_collections.py → convert to Fabric notebook
Upload nb_fabric_ml_04_channel_roi.py → convert to Fabric notebook
Upload nb_fabric_ml_retrain_full.py → convert to Fabric notebook
Verify all 5 notebooks appear in FASTA_DW workspace
Run each notebook manually (non-Fabric path) to confirm no import errors
items.note: Use Spark runtime 1.2 (Spark 3.4); SynapseML 1.0+ required for LightGBM path

items.task: Import pl_01_bronze_ingest.json to Fabric Data Factory
Import pl_02_silver_cleanse.json
Import pl_03_gold_marts.json
Import pl_04_ml_scoring.json
Import df_silver_customers.json dataflow
Validate all pipeline activity dependencies in Fabric UI
Set globalParameter: teams_webhook_url (Teams Incoming Webhook for ML alerts)
Set globalParameter: pbi_workspace_id (Power BI workspace GUID)
Set globalParameter: pbi_ml_dataset_id (FASTA_ML_Analytics semantic model ID)
Set globalParameter: pbi_dataset_id (main FASTA_DW semantic model ID)
Assign Fabric pipeline MSI 'Power BI Contributor' role on workspace
items.note: Required for ACT_Refresh_PBI_ML_Report and ACT_Refresh_PowerBI_Dataset (MSI auth)

items.task: Confirm ls_fabric_lakehouse linked service can reach FastaLakehouse
Import tr_daily_bronze_ingest.json trigger
Import tr_saturday_ml_scoring.json trigger
Activate tr_daily_bronze_ingest (Mon-Fri 03:00 SAST)
Activate tr_saturday_ml_scoring (Sat 02:00 SAST)
Confirm trigger next-fire times in Fabric UI
Run pl_04_ml_scoring manually with force_run=true
Confirm all 4 notebook activities complete (green in Fabric monitor)
Confirm gold.mart_credit_risk_scores row count > 0
Confirm gold.mart_affordability_scores row count > 0
Confirm gold.mart_churn_scores row count > 0
Confirm gold.mart_channel_roi row count > 0
Confirm gold._pipeline_audit has SUCCESS row for pl_04
Confirm MLflow experiment has run entries for all 4 models
Confirm fasta.models.* has registered model versions
Confirm Power BI FASTA_ML_Analytics report refreshed
Run pl_04 with force_run=true and retrain_threshold_auc=0.99 to force retrain
Confirm Teams webhook fires with model degradation card
Confirm nb_fabric_ml_retrain_full completes (expect ~90 min)
Confirm new model version appears in fasta.models.credit_risk
Confirm gold._model_health_log has RETRAINED row
Reset retrain_threshold_auc back to 0.70 after test
First Saturday live run: 2026-06-20 02:00 SAST — monitor Fabric pipeline runs
Check pipeline_run_log / gold._pipeline_audit next morning
Set up weekly AUC drift alerting on gold._model_health_log
Schedule quarterly manual retrain review (end of each quarter)
Tag deployment in git: v1.0-fasta-ml-pipeline

rollback_plan.trigger: Any notebook fails after 1 retry, or pipeline_status stays RUNNING > 6h
steps: Check Fabric monitor for failed activity and error message
Re-run failed notebook manually in Fabric for faster iteration
Roll back gold mart scores to previous week snapshot via Delta time-travel: RESTORE TABLE gold.mart_credit_risk_scores TO VERSION AS OF <prev_version>
Raise incident in tracking system; fix and re-deploy
